meaning: adj.强制的,暴力的,有说服力的
examples: The police checked all windows and doors for signs of forcible entry.
Reports are coming in of the forcible resettlement of villagers from the countryside into towns.
It has also logged 35,549 cases of forcible disappearance since 1981.
Scientology defectors are full of tales of forcible family separations, which the church almost uniformly denies.
Detroit also ranked high for violent crime (No. 2), robbery (No. 4) and forcible rape (No. 12).
